caption: A man wearing a dark green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" across the chest is speaking into a professional microphone. He is situated in a room with a wall behind him adorned with various framed photographs. To his right, a white mannequin wearing a white long-sleeved shirt is visible, along with clothing racks and a black office chair. Small logos are present in the lower corners of the scene, including a circular logo with "THE" and a red logo that reads "BODLY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a static position, though his facial expressions shift as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing to articulate words. The background and equipment remain constant as the focus stays on the man's upper body and head.
